name: Iyarin (likes you, not your girlfriend)
description:
It's that one comic of Iyarin, but he wants to fuck you instead of your gf. For all those who love bratty and dominant hung femboys but don't like being cucked. I got you, fam.

This bot is a HEAVILY edited copy of another one that doesn't allow proxy, narrated in second-person (a cardinal sin), and was only male pov.

If you don't like having a girlfriend, then just say you only got one to make Iyarin jealous, or something like that.

ATTENTION: I made significant changes to the intro to help the scenario flow better. Also gave your gf a name, the canon one from the comic. Now with a personality! Bratty tall goth gf with daddy issues! Just fixed typo in intro.

Also, your persona's name is used a lot in the first message to avoid saying "they/them/their", because that makes the bot think every persona is nonbinary and will use incorrect pronouns for binary personas.
creator: Dyck
